name: eta-template-language
description: Eta syntax highlighting and Prettier-backed formatting for Cursor and VS Code-compatible editors.

etaFormatter.formatHtml.markdownDescription: Format HTML regions around Eta tags with Prettier's HTML parser.

etaFormatter.printWidth.markdownDescription: Preferred maximum line width for Eta formatting.

etaFormatter.singleQuote.markdownDescription: Use single quotes when Prettier formats JavaScript inside Eta tags.

etaFormatter.semi.markdownDescription: Print semicolons when Prettier formats JavaScript inside Eta tags.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace prettier-plugin-eta && npm run build:extension
scripts.build:extension: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --external:vscode --external:prettier --outfile=dist/extension.js
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run test && npx --no-install vsce package && node --test tests/vsix-package.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:syntax && npm run test:plugin && npm run test:extension
scripts.test:syntax: python3 scripts/generate_grammars.py && python3 tests/test_generated_grammars.py && python3 tests/test_syntax_patterns.py && node --test tests/textmate-tokenization.test.mjs
